intent: Run a mock adapter-backed implementation loop and prove review to memory/context continuity.
acceptance_criteria: The mock provider returns an accepted runtime adapter response.
The runtime job state captures runtime events and artifact refs.
The hardened review report separates blockers and artifact-backed evidence.
The memory/context hardening layer produces accepted decisions, blockers, artifact summaries and next-run context.
nexus_integration_notes: This scenario proves the in-process adapter path before real worker execution.
Raw runtime events must not be persisted into memory packets.
